title: Automatically reference all tipper axes
summary: Use the operator HMI controls RESET, AUTO REF, AUTO, and CYCLE START to reference all tipper axes and return the tipper system to operation. Referencing is complete when the "R" icons turn green.
when_to_use: Use when tipper axes need to be referenced using the HMI and the system must be returned to operation. The source places this procedure in maintenance procedures and indicates completion by green "R" icons.
not_for: Do not restart operation until referencing is completed and the "R" icons are green.
Not for cases where additional recovery is required after referencing fails to complete; the source does not provide further recovery steps.

responsibilities: Perform HMI-based reset and automatic axis reference.
Verify reference completion by confirming the "R" icons turn green.
Return the system to AUTO and press CYCLE START only after referencing is complete.

safety_notes: Do not proceed to restart operation until referencing is completed and the "R" icons are green.
The source does not provide additional recovery steps if referencing does not complete.
access_or_tools_needed: Access to the relevant HMI controls: RESET, AUTO REF, AUTO, and CYCLE START

access_required: Access to the operator HMI with RESET, AUTO REF, AUTO, and CYCLE START controls
system_preconditions: Tipper axes require referencing before return to operation.

visual_references.description: Operator station HMI screen on page 103 associated with axis referencing and nearby automatic reference steps.
Operator station HMI screen on page 103 associated with maintenance referencing context and nearby RESET, AUTO REF, AUTO, and CYCLE START actions.
Operator station control panel reference showing AUTO and CYCLE START controls on the tipper machine control panel.
System/operator station screen context describing AUTO REF homing during startup.
Photo reference showing AUTO and CYCLE START controls used to return to automatic operation.

steps.title: Press RESET
steps.purpose: Clear the condition before starting automatic axis referencing.
steps.instruction: On the relevant operator HMI, press RESET.
steps.expected_result: The system is reset and ready for the automatic reference action.
steps.healthy_condition: RESET is accepted on the HMI and the procedure can continue to AUTO REF.
steps.failure_condition: RESET is not accepted or the system does not allow progression to referencing.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Relevant operator station HMI screen used for axis referencing actions.
Operator station HMI context on page 103 where nearby text includes RESET and automatic referencing actions.

stop_or_escalate_if: RESET is not accepted on the HMI.
The system does not proceed to allow automatic referencing.

source_evidence.text: Related nearby maintenance context also includes automatic axis referencing, RESET, AUTO REF, green 'R' icons, AUTO, and CYCLE START for restarting operation after referencing.

steps.title: Start automatic reference for all tipper axes
steps.purpose: Initiate automatic homing/reference of all tipper axes.
steps.instruction: Press AUTO REF to reference all of the axes of the tippers.
steps.expected_result: Automatic referencing begins for all tipper axes.
steps.healthy_condition: AUTO REF is accepted and the tipper axes begin the reference process.
steps.failure_condition: AUTO REF does not start referencing or the axes do not begin the reference process.

actions.label: Press AUTO REF
actions.exact_action: Press AUTO REF to reference all of the axes of the tippers.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Operator station HMI used for referencing axes.
Startup/reference context showing AUTO REF used to home axes.

stop_or_escalate_if: AUTO REF does not initiate referencing.
Axis reference motion does not begin as expected.

source_evidence.text: Press AUTO REF to reference all of the axes of the tippers.

Tipper axis reference: Z1 and A1 are left tipper axes; Z2 and A2 are right tipper axes; AUTO REF initiates homing; axis button changes green to yellow while moving; motion stops at home proximity switch.

steps.title: Verify reference completion
steps.purpose: Confirm that automatic referencing has completed before returning the system to operation.
steps.instruction: Verify that the "R" icons turn green to indicate referencing is completed.
steps.expected_result: The "R" icons are green, indicating referencing is complete.
steps.failure_condition: The "R" icons do not turn green or referencing does not complete.

actions.label: Check R icons
actions.exact_action: Verify that the 'R' icons turn green to indicate referencing is completed.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The HMI status area where the 'R' icons indicate reference completion.
Operator station HMI context associated with reference completion indication.

stop_or_escalate_if: The "R" icons do not turn green.
You cannot confirm reference completion on the HMI.

source_evidence.text: Verify that the 'R' icons turn green to indicate referencing is completed.
Status reference for axis referencing: green R icons indicate referencing is completed.
The 'R' icons will turn green when referencing is completed.

steps.title: Return the tipper to AUTO mode
steps.purpose: Place the system back into automatic mode after successful referencing.
steps.instruction: When referencing is completed, press AUTO.
steps.expected_result: The tipper is placed in AUTO mode.
steps.healthy_condition: AUTO mode is selected after reference completion.
steps.failure_condition: AUTO mode cannot be selected or is selected before referencing is complete.

actions.label: Press AUTO
actions.exact_action: When referencing is completed, press AUTO.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: AUTO control on the operator station control panel.
AUTO control used to return the system to automatic operation.

source_evidence.text: When referencing is completed, press AUTO.
Nearby text identifies interface items including an AUTO button for automatic mode.
Nearby procedure text instructs the operator to press AUTO to enter automatic mode.

steps.title: Restart operation with CYCLE START
steps.purpose: Resume operation after the tipper axes have been successfully referenced and AUTO mode is active.
steps.instruction: Press CYCLE START to restart operation.
steps.healthy_condition: The system resumes operation after CYCLE START is pressed.
steps.failure_condition: Operation does not restart or restart is attempted before referencing is complete.

actions.label: Press CYCLE START
actions.exact_action: Press CYCLE START to restart operation.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: CYCLE START control on the operator station control panel.
CYCLE START control used to resume automatic operation.

stop_or_escalate_if: The "R" icons are not green before restart.
Operation does not restart after CYCLE START is pressed.

source_evidence.text: Press CYCLE START to restart operation.
Nearby text identifies CYCLE START and CYCLE STOP controls for automatic operation.
Nearby procedure text instructs the operator to press CYCLE START.

success_criteria: The system is returned to AUTO mode.
Operation restarts after CYCLE START is pressed.
healthy_conditions: The "R" icons turn green when referencing is completed.
AUTO mode can be selected after referencing.
Operation resumes after CYCLE START is pressed.
failure_conditions: AUTO REF does not start referencing.
The "R" icons do not turn green.
AUTO mode cannot be selected after referencing.
Operation does not restart after CYCLE START is pressed.
escalation_guidance: Do not proceed to restart operation until referencing is completed and the "R" icons are green.
If referencing does not complete, stop and escalate because the source does not provide additional recovery steps.
